title: Enforce daily and monthly Odds API budget policy without live-stream dependence
objective: Verify current Odds API budgeting behavior and add the smallest safe monthly pacing/hard-cap enforcement while keeping Odds API verification-only and non-streaming.
acceptance_criteria: daily hard cap of 600 is enforced
monthly usage pacing is visible and safely buffered
live dashboard remains independent of Odds API streaming
rollback: Revert the narrow budget-enforcement change in sports/mlb/sharp_odds.py if needed.
